_comment_target: EgoWM-style legacy render path (use_embodiment_adapter=false, legacy_render_variant='egowm') on 8x L40 (48 GB each), full 891-clip droid_1k dataset, FSDP. Mirrors EgoWM Eq. 5–6 (Bagchi et al. 2026): per-token spatial RenderSpatialEncoder → directly added to per-token temb → time_proj. NO scalar render_gate, NO render_fuse Linear — the encoder output IS the conditioning, no attenuation. NOT identity-at-init (random encoder weights perturb temb at step 0); model recovers via fine-tuning, same as EgoWM relies on its strong prior. Trainable params ≈ render_encoder (RenderSpatialEncoder, larger than v1 because it keeps spatial structure) + last 8 unfrozen blocks + tracks_head. Sharded across 8 GPUs.
_precompute_cache_note: Same data + num_frames + h + w + max_seq_len + ignore_prompts as the v1 legacy config → cache HITS instantly (cache key is data-only, not architecture-dependent).
